items.title: Knicks vs Spurs NBA Finals PREVIEW w/ James Worthy, Robert Horry & DeAndre Jordan
items.author: Road Trippin' Show
items.body_excerpt: In this episode of Road Trippin', RJ, Perk, Channing and Allie are LIVE from the NBA Finals in San Antonio, where Robert Horry makes his case that the world is crowning Victor Wembanyama too soon — and Perk fights him on it. James Worthy and DeAndre Jordan also stop by to break…
